title: Rapid Transaction Burst
description: Multiple transactions occurring within a very short time frame (e.g., minutes or seconds), often across different merchants.
risk_indicators: Amounts often below typical fraud limits
recommended_action: Temporarily freeze card, contact customer for verification.

title: Unusual Geographic Spending
description: Transactions occurring in locations significantly different from the user's historical spending profile, especially cross-border.
risk_indicators: Physical transactions far from home address
recommended_action: Verify transaction via SMS or app notification. Escalate if unconfirmed.

title: Sudden Large Transactions
description: A transaction amount that is significantly higher than the user's average spending pattern.
recommended_action: Hold transaction for manual review, require multi-factor authentication.

title: Card-Not-Present Fraud
description: Online or phone purchases where the physical card is not swiped or dipped, often using stolen card details.
recommended_action: Flag for enhanced review. If CVV failures preceded the success, decline the transaction.

title: Repeated Declined Transactions
description: Multiple sequential transactions declined due to incorrect PIN, CVV, or insufficient funds.
risk_indicators: Testing small amounts before a large transaction
recommended_action: Block further attempts and alert the fraud monitoring team.
